summary: A Jest test suite failed: one test suite in test/config/get.ts threw an error during the run, causing the test job to exit with status 1.
root_cause: A test in test/config/get.ts failed at runtime (see stack trace at test/config/get.ts:32:38), causing Jest to exit with a non-zero status.

evidence.quote: Test Suites: 1 failed, 3 skipped, 61 passed, 62 of 65 total
evidence.reason: Shows that at least one test suite failed in the Jest run.
Provides the stack trace location of the failing test (file and line).

evidence.quote: [WARN] Failed to replace env in config: ${ENV_VAR_123}
evidence.reason: Shows a warning about an environment variable replacement failure that may be related to the failing test in test/config/get.ts.

suggested_fix: Inspect test/config/get.ts at the indicated line (line 32) to see why it throws; ensure required environment variables (for example ENV_VAR_123) are set in the CI environment or modify the test/config code to handle missing env vars. Re-run the tests after fixing the expectation or setting the env var.
